description: Trigger a Sifflet monitor run and surface results as a Dagster asset check.

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key to attach this check to

sifflet_tenant_env_var.label: Sifflet Tenant Env Var
sifflet_tenant_env_var.description: Env var with Sifflet tenant name (e.g.

api_token_env_var.label: Api Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with Sifflet API token

monitor_id.label: Monitor Id
monitor_id.description: UUID of the Sifflet monitor to run. Find in Sifflet UI: Monitor → Details → ID.

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout Seconds
timeout_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait for monitor run
